mapper.insert: INSERT INTO registration_record(user_id, patient_id, doctor_id, schedule_date, schedule_time, amount, status,reg_no) VALUES(#{userId}, #{patientId}, #{doctorId}, #{scheduleDate}, #{scheduleTime}, #{amount}, #{status},#{regNo} )
mapper.update:
update registration_record
doctor_id = #{doctor.id},
schedule_date = #{scheduleDate},
schedule_time = #{scheduleTime},
amount = #{amount},
status = #{payStatus},
visit_status = #{visitStatus},
where reg_no = #{regNo}
mapper.select: select rr.id, rr.reg_no, pa.name, pa.age, pa.gender, do.department, rr.schedule_date, rr.schedule_time, rr.create_time, rr.visit_status, rr.status as payStatus, rr.amount, rr.doctor_id as doctor_id from registration_record as rr join users as us on rr.user_id = us.id join patients as pa on rr.patient_id = pa.id join doctors as do on rr.doctor_id = do.id where rr.id = #{id}

select rr.id, rr.reg_no, pa.name, pa.age, pa.gender, do.department, rr.schedule_date, rr.schedule_time, rr.create_time, rr.visit_status, rr.status as payStatus, rr.amount, rr.doctor_id as doctor_id from registration_record as rr join users as us on rr.user_id = us.id join patients as pa on rr.patient_id = pa.id join doctors as do on rr.doctor_id = do.id where rr.reg_no = #{regNo}
SELECT count(*) FROM registration_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND visit_status = 3 AND create_time >= #{startDate}

select rr.id, rr.reg_no, pa.name, pa.age, pa.gender, do.department, rr.schedule_date, rr.schedule_time, rr.create_time, rr.visit_status, rr.status as payStatus, rr.amount, rr.doctor_id as doctor_id from registration_record as rr join users as us on rr.user_id = us.id join patients as pa on rr.patient_id = pa.id join doctors as do on rr.doctor_id = do.id order by rr.id

select rr.id, rr.reg_no, pa.name, pa.age, pa.gender, do.department, rr.schedule_date, rr.schedule_time, rr.create_time, rr.visit_status, rr.status as payStatus, rr.amount, rr.doctor_id as doctor_id from registration_record as rr join users as us on rr.user_id = us.id join patients as pa on rr.patient_id = pa.id join doctors as do on rr.doctor_id = do.id where rr.doctor_id = #{doctorId} order by rr.id

select rr.id, rr.reg_no, pa.name, pa.age, pa.gender, do.department, rr.schedule_date, rr.schedule_time, rr.create_time, rr.visit_status, rr.status as payStatus, rr.amount, rr.doctor_id as doctor_id from registration_record as rr join users as us on rr.user_id = us.id join patients as pa on rr.patient_id = pa.id join doctors as do on rr.doctor_id = do.id where rr.doctor_id = #{doctorId} and rr.schedule_date = #{date} order by rr.id
mapper.update: update registration_record set visit_status=#{visitStatus} where reg_no=#{regNo}
mapper.select: SELECT r.reg_no AS id, d.name AS doctorName, d.department AS department, CONCAT(r.schedule_date, ' ', r.schedule_time) AS time, (UNIX_TIMESTAMP(r.create_time) * 1000) AS createTime, CASE WHEN r.visit_status IN (0, 1) THEN 'upcoming' WHEN r.visit_status = 2 THEN 'completed' WHEN r.visit_status = 3 THEN 'cancelled' ELSE 'upcoming' END AS status, r.doctor_id AS doctorId, d.image AS doctorAvatar FROM registration_record r LEFT JOIN doctors d ON r.doctor_id = d.id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.create_time DESC

SELECT p.id AS pid, d.name AS doctorName, d.department, CONCAT(rr.schedule_date, ' ', rr.schedule_time) AS time, CASE WHEN p.id IS NOT NULL THEN '已开方' ELSE '待开方' END AS status, UNIX_TIMESTAMP(p.create_time) * 1000 AS createTime, p.msg AS diagnosis, m.name AS medicineName, pm.count, pm.used_count AS usedCount, m.prescription FROM registration_record rr JOIN doctors d ON rr.doctor_id = d.id LEFT JOIN prescription p ON rr.id = p.registration_id LEFT JOIN prescription_mediclie pm ON p.id = pm.prescription_id LEFT JOIN medicine m ON pm.medicine_id = m.id WHERE rr.reg_no = #{regNo}
